candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv>=90% SHORT but green_matches=0 (no historical analog pattern confirmation), defer entry rather than treating high conviction as a green light.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A high live-conviction read with zero green_matches means the current indicator configuration has no successful precedent in historical memory — the bears are crowded in real-time but the setup has never resolved profitably before, which is the signature of a consensus that arrived late after the institutional move already exhausted. Crowded directional agreement with no historical analog is a fade-the-crowd warning, not a momentum confirmation.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # require historical analog before full size
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Win rate +3-5% and drawdown reduction by avoiding late-stage crowded entries; Sharpe contribution ~+0.02 via fewer reversal losses on EURUSD/AUDUSD SHORT signals.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows EURUSD conv=100% and AUDUSD conv=100% SHORT, both with green_matches=0 and hist_hr 66%/70% — the historical hit rate is decent but the CURRENT configuration has no green match, indicating this specific high-conviction state is unvalidated against memory. USDJPY/AUDNZD show conv 83%/92% with hist_hr=0%, reinforcing that conviction without analog support is unreliable.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 in a bull market; current regime is UNKNOWN/MOMENTUM with VIX ~18.9 and UMich sentiment collapsing (49.8 -> 44.8), so the bull-market premise underlying the 13 threshold may no longer hold — worth re-validating whether the gate should adapt to deteriorating sentiment regimes.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView providing no confirming signals — system is correctly idling at 75% internal-only sizing, but the lack of closed decisions means all lessons remain harvest-derived until the logger accumulates entries.
